form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (35.12) in a OPEN, finishing a 5 length seventh. Has five wins and five placings from 15 starts from the draw. Will need some luck to feature.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 595m. Last start finished 2nd on April 6 over 530m at this track behind Double Helix beaten 2.5 lengths (30.69) in a Grade 6. Racing well and can find winning form again.

form.formComment: Comes off a (43.07) win last time, scoring by 2.5 lengths in a OPEN over 730m at this track. Goes very well off the draw boasting five wins and three places from nine starts. Key chance and should go close.
